game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Players choose a character and navigate a procedurally generated map, engaging in turn-based card battles against enemies by playing attack, skill, and power cards from a dynamically built deck. The core gameplay involves managing energy and card draws to strategically defeat foes, with rules governing card costs, effects, and enemy intentions; after each battle, players choose new cards, remove old ones, or acquire relics that grant passive abilities, constantly evolving their deck.
game_info.description: Card Conqueror is a turn-based deck-building roguelike where you battle through a series of enemies using cards. Each turn you draw cards that cost energy to play, allowing you to attack enemies or defend yourself. After each battle, you can add new cards to your deck, improving your strategy as you progress. Your goal is to defeat all enemies and reach the final boss to win the game.
game_info.controls:
UP/DOWN: Navigate menu options and select cards in your hand
LEFT/RIGHT: Switch between viewing your draw pile and discard pile during battle
SPACE: Play the currently selected card during your turn
Z: End your turn when you're done playing cards
SHIFT: View enemy intentions during battle
ENTER: Start the game and confirm selections
ESC: Pause the game
R: Restart the game
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Testing the basic game functionality and stability by simulating random player actions to ensure the game handles inputs properly without errors.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Randomly select cards from the hand and play them, occasionally ending turns, ensuring all game mechanics function correctly through multiple battles.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The game should progress through multiple battles without errors, responding appropriately to all inputs regardless of their timing or sequence.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>

<TEST_2>
<test_description>Testing the win condition by implementing an optimal strategy to defeat all enemies and reach the final boss.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Prioritize high-damage cards against low-health enemies, use block cards efficiently when enemy intends to attack, and strategically end turns to maximize card efficiency.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The player should successfully defeat all enemies including the final boss, triggering the win screen.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>

<TEST_3>
<test_description>Testing the card selection and reward system after battles to ensure proper deck building progression.</test_description>
<strategy_description>After each battle, select cards that balance the deck between attack and defense, focusing on cards that synergize well together.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The player's deck should grow strategically with balanced attack and defense capabilities, making future battles manageable.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>

<TEST_4>
<test_description>Testing the energy management system to ensure players can effectively use their limited energy each turn.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Play cards that maximize energy efficiency, prioritizing high-value cards and avoiding ending turns with unused energy when possible.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The player should be able to effectively use their energy each turn, making strategic decisions about which cards to play.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>

<TEST_5>
<test_description>Testing the enemy AI and intention system to ensure enemies behave as expected and player can react accordingly.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Observe enemy intentions and respond appropriately, playing block cards when enemy intends to attack and attack cards when enemy is vulnerable.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Enemy intentions should be clearly displayed and their actions should match their displayed intentions, allowing for strategic counterplay.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
